appraisal_events.evidence: « j'avoue que je trouvai une certaine grandeur dans la royale politesse... »; gestes spontanés de pourboires et de paroles gracieuses; « ...comme si elle régnait déjà. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator revalues the princess by reading a sovereign greatness in her manners, transforming protocol gestures into signs of natural authority.

status_effects.explanation: In this passage, she is presented as dignified and sovereign by the narrator, which locally elevates her esteem.
